text.title: Team AI Usage Policy Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Team AI Usage Policy output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: policy is longer than 1 printed page
tool_allowlist is empty AND tools are in active use

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: policy_version populated with a typed value
always_ok_list populated with a typed value
never_ok_list populated with a typed value
ask_first_list populated with a typed value
tool_allowlist populated with a typed value
incident_response_url populated with a typed value
last_reviewed populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
